transcription:
Pax Concordia.
A city that never stops... and never forgives.

People here move fast.
You have to.

Me and her... we thought we could beat the system.
We were wrong.

Now we owe 10,000 credits.
By sunrise.

It's not just money.
It's survival.

So I hacked an Axiom Mobility taxi.
Turned it into our lifeline.

One night to fix everything.
Or lose it all.
